title: Melissa Jones
compiled_truth: Melissa Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-03), Melissa Jones sent 8 and received 138 emails, totalling 146 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jean Mrha](people/jean-mrha) (6), [Brian Redmond](people/brian-redmond) (4), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (4), [Mark Knippa](people/mark-knippa) (3), [Andrew Miles](people/andrew-miles) (3). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, inbox.
